Fields.Name: Direction: X
Fields.Description: X-axis component of the direction vector.

Fields.Name: Direction: Y
Fields.Description: Y-axis component of the direction vector.

Fields.Name: Direction: Z
Fields.Description: Z-axis component of the direction vector.

Fields.Name: Minimum Speed
Fields.Description: Lower bound of speed for the directional behavior.

Fields.Name: Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: Upper bound of speed for the directional behavior.

Fields.Name: Minimum Frequency
Fields.Description: Lower bound of frequency for direction updates or oscillation.

Fields.Name: Maximum Frequency
Fields.Description: Upper bound of frequency for direction updates or oscillation.

Fields.Name: Priority
Fields.Description: Determines the priority level of this directional behavior compared to others.
